tools.name: trust_check
tools.description: Pass/fail trust verdict for any AI agent across ERC-8004, Olas, or Virtuals registries. Returns score, tier, badges, and reasoning.

tools.name: reviewer_analysis
tools.description: Analyze wallet ages of every reviewer who left feedback on an agent. Detects sybil patterns like same-day wallet creation clusters.

tools.name: compare_agents
tools.description: Side-by-side trust comparison of 2-10 agents, ranked by score with reviewer quality summary for each.

tools.name: address_age
tools.description: Look up wallet age in days for any address. The uncheatable signal; time cannot be faked.

tools.name: network_stats
tools.description: Network-wide statistics; total agents by registry, chain distribution, commerce job counts, and trust score tier distribution across 180,000+ indexed agents.

tools.name: reviewer_wallet
tools.description: Behavior profile for any reviewer wallet; velocity, sweep patterns, score clustering, and sybil signals across the entire ERC-8004 ecosystem. Shows how this wallet behaves when reviewing agents.

tools.name: commerce_stats
tools.description: Commerce activity for an agent or address; job count, unique counterparties, repeat client rate, total earnings. Covers Olas Mechs and Virtuals ACP protocols.

tools.name: entity
tools.description: Full operator footprint for any wallet address — all agents owned, trust scores, sybil signals, wallet intelligence, and MCP servers associated with that operator.

tools.name: mcp_attestation
tools.description: ES256-signed attestation for any MCP server. Returns risk score, threat findings, and a signed envelope verifiable against the JWKS endpoint using kid rnwy-mcp-v1.

tools.name: risk_terms
tools.description: Counterparty risk intelligence for any agent. Returns risk tier (low/moderate/elevated/high/severe/critical), raw trust signals, data coverage, and methodology reference. Designed for marketplace operators and escrow providers setting transaction parameters before a deal. Full methodology: https://r
